phase: Phase 2 — Rule Field Normalization & Hard Deletes
prior_stop_reason: TALLY-144-2C.1 first attempt STOPPED on dispatch-listed STOP condition: attribute_registry/department_key did not exist. Resolved by 2C.0.

source_leak_root_cause.step: C.6 — Mirror Required Identity Fields into attribute_values
source_leak_root_cause.construct: fieldsToWriteAsAttributes object literal (declared at L818 pre-patch) iterated by the for-of loop that writes attribute_values/<fieldKey> docs.
non_writers_audited: C.5 attributes loop already skips 'department' via skipCanonical (importFullProduct.ts L683).
L520-532 importAttributes loop writes only mpn/sku/brand/product_name/status — no department writer.
ricsParser.ts: only comment hit on attribute_values; no Firestore writes.
registryAuthority.ts: reads class/age_group/gender registry only; no writes.

files_NOT_changed: attribute_registry — no live writes (registry doc was created by 2C.0; nothing written this turn)

before.fields_to_write_as_attributes_department: department: mapped.top_level.department  // canonical display string from canonicalizeDepartment

after.fields_to_write_as_attributes_entry: department_key: mapped.top_level.department_key  // canonical key from deptMatch?.key (e.g. 'accessories' / 'footwear' / 'clothing')

before_after_behavior.empty_value_safety: Loop's existing `if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") continue;` filters products without a canonical department match; legacy av/department docs already on disk are NOT touched (handled by 2C / PR #135).
before_after_behavior.root_product_unchanged: productRef.set(mapped.top_level, { merge: true }) at L597 still sets BOTH product.department (display) AND product.department_key (canonical) on the root doc. Per dispatch: 'Do not remove root product.department display field'.

diff_summary.scope: Single object-literal entry inside Step C.6's fieldsToWriteAsAttributes plus its preceding comment block.

build_result.result: tsc clean — no errors, no warnings

static_validation.grep_department_key_colon: 1 match at L836 inside fieldsToWriteAsAttributes (the new entry).
static_validation.grep_legacy_department_colon_in_fieldsTo: 0 matches — the legacy `department: mapped.top_level.department` entry has been removed from the mirror loop.
remaining_department_colon_occurrences_i: L656 — `department: mapped.attributes.department` inside buildSearchTokens({...}) call. NOT an attribute_values write; feeds the search-token builder. Display string is intentional here for token generation.
static_validation.c5_skip_canonical_still_excludes_departm: L683 `skipCanonical` set still includes 'department' — the C.5 attributes loop continues to refuse writing av/department from the raw RICS-mapped payload. With C.6 also now refusing, the legacy doc has no remaining writer in this file.

confirmations.registry_prerequisite_satisfied: attribute_registry/department_key exists on ropi-aoss-dev (verified live earlier; created by 2C.0).

stop_conditions_evaluated.source_path_differs_from_prior_stop_repo: false — same file/step (importFullProduct.ts Step C.6 mirror loop fieldsToWriteAsAttributes literal)
stop_conditions_evaluated.root_department_key_unavailable_before_m: false — mapped.top_level.department_key is set at L588 (deptMatch?.key ?? "") and the productRef.set(mapped.top_level, { merge: true }) at L597 stamps it on root before C.6 runs

next_step: Open PR. After merge, resume TALLY-144-2C apply with the approved quarantine shape (PR #135).
